title: App Store Connect — Brotein Premium Monthly 'Ready to Submit' (review screenshot uploaded)
html:
App Store Connect Brotein Premium Monthly subscription detail view — status Ready to Submit. Reference Name broteinn._premium_monthly (typo with double n!), Product ID surfaced as 6749212191 ID; Family Sharing enabled, Availability "All countries or regions selected"; Subscription Description filled; review screenshot uploaded showing the Brotein Homepage (per the Review-Notes-3984 line). Final step before submitting to App Review.

TL;DR

  • Brotein Premium Monthly is Ready to Submit at 4:39 pm — closes the 2025-07-27 → 2025-07-31 paywall sprint.
  • Reference Name typo broteinn._premium_monthly (double n) — visible bug, may surface as a UI gotcha later.
  • Review screenshot = Brotein Homepage; review notes field referenced as 3984 (chars or note-ID).

brotein · app store connect · revenuecat · testflight
